message:
fix(web,http): fix percent_decode UTF-8 handling and IPv6 URL parsing

percent_decode was casting raw bytes to char, breaking multi-byte UTF-8
sequences (e.g., %C3%A9 for é). Now accumulates bytes and converts via
String::from_utf8().

ParsedUrl::parse used rfind(':') which broke IPv6 addresses like
[::1]:8080. Now handles bracketed IPv6 addresses before falling back to
rfind.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
